'''Mantessa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Orus sector/Legends|Orus sector]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. The world was encased in [[Forest/Legends|forests]] and treacherous [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]]. The wilderness was extremely dangerous due to the existence of [[Mantessan panthac]]s, predatory animals who stalked and killed quite efficiently in their home environment.

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], a force of [[Fire Breather]]s were [[Battle of Mantessa|driven off]] the planet by the [[Orange Panthacs]].

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Orus sector and, consequently, Mantessa, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The in-game encyclopedia entry for Mantessa also implies the world is entirely covered by jungle, with no mention of forestry.
